modules.module_title: Module 1: Introduction to Artificial Jewellery Making
Module 4: Design Principles and Colour Theory
Module 5: Advanced Techniques and Specific Jewellery Types
Module 6: Finishing, Packaging, and Business Aspects

questions.question: Artificial jewellery ko aur kis naam se jaana jaata hai?

options.B: Precious Jewellery

questions.explanation: Artificial jewellery ko fashion jewellery ke naam se bhi jaana jaata hai, kyunki yeh trends aur fashion ke hisaab se change hoti rehti hai.

questions.question: Artificial jewellery banane ka primary reason kya hai?

options.B: High intrinsic value

questions.explanation: Artificial jewellery banane ka mukhya karan yeh hai ki yeh asli heere-javahrat ki tulna mein bahut sasti hoti hai aur aam log bhi ise afford kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Artificial jewellery mein kaun si metal commonly use hoti hai?

options.B: Silver

questions.explanation: Brass (peetal) artificial jewellery mein commonly use hone wali metal hai, kyunki yeh sasti aur durable hoti hai aur ispar plating bhi easily ho jaati hai.

questions.question: Artificial jewellery industry ka scope kaisa hai?

options.B: Growing and diverse

questions.explanation: Artificial jewellery industry ka scope bahut badh raha hai aur diverse hai, kyunki log naye designs aur affordable options pasand karte hain.

questions.question: Handicrafts & Creative Arts sector mein artificial jewellery making ki kya importance hai?

options.B: It promotes traditional art forms and self-employment
options.C: It is only for mass production

questions.explanation: Handicrafts sector mein artificial jewellery making traditional art forms ko promote karta hai aur logon ko self-employment ke avasar deta hai.

questions.question: Artificial jewellery banate samay safety ke liye kya pehenna zaroori hai?

options.B: Helmet

questions.explanation: Chhote parts aur chemicals se bachne ke liye gloves pehenna zaroori hai, especially jab glue ya sharp tools use kar rahe hon.

questions.question: Which of these is NOT a common material for artificial jewellery?

options.B: Glass stones

questions.explanation: Diamonds precious stones hain aur artificial jewellery mein generally use nahi hote, kyunki yeh bahut expensive hote hain.

questions.question: Artificial jewellery mein 'plating' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Base metal par ek thin layer of another metal lagana

questions.explanation: Plating mein base metal (jaise brass) par gold, silver ya rhodium jaise kisi dusre metal ki patli parat chadhaai jaati hai, taaki jewellery attractive lage aur tarnish na ho.

questions.question: Artificial jewellery banane mein creativity kyon important hai?

options.B: To copy existing designs
options.C: To create unique and appealing designs

questions.explanation: Creativity bahut zaroori hai taaki aap naye, unique aur attractive designs bana sakein jo customers ko pasand aayein aur market mein alag dikhein.

questions.question: Artificial jewellery ka ek fayda kya hai?

options.A: It retains its value over time
options.B: It is hypoallergenic for everyone
options.C: It allows for frequent style changes without huge investment
options.D: It is always made with natural materials

questions.explanation: Artificial jewellery ka ek bada fayda yeh hai ki yeh sasti hoti hai, isliye aap alag-alag occasions aur outfits ke liye bina zyada kharch kiye naye styles try kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Artificial jewellery banane ke liye kaun sa skill sabse zyada important hai?

options.B: Fine motor skills and patience

questions.explanation: Artificial jewellery banane ke liye chhote-chhote components ke saath kaam karna hota hai, isliye fine motor skills (haathon ki safai) aur patience bahut zaroori hain.

questions.question: Artificial jewellery mein 'findings' kise kehte hain?

options.B: Jewellery ke decorative elements
options.C: Small components like clasps, jump rings, ear hooks

questions.explanation: Findings woh chhote-chhote components hote hain jo jewellery ko banane aur use pehenne mein help karte hain, jaise clasps, jump rings, ear hooks, headpins, etc.

questions.question: Jewellery making mein 'ergonomics' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Working environment ko comfortable aur efficient banana

questions.explanation: Ergonomics ka matlab hai apne working environment (jaise chair, table, tools) ko is tarah adjust karna ki kaam karte samay aap comfortable rahen aur injury ka risk kam ho.

questions.question: Artificial jewellery ki maintenance ke liye kya avoid karna chahiye?

options.B: Exposure to perfumes and chemicals

questions.explanation: Perfumes, lotions aur harsh chemicals artificial jewellery ki plating ko damage kar sakte hain, isliye inke contact se bachna chahiye.

questions.question: Artificial jewellery ka ek disadvantage kya hai?

options.B: It has very low design variety
options.C: It may cause skin allergies in some individuals

questions.explanation: Kuchh logon ko artificial jewellery mein use hone wale metals (jaise nickel) se skin allergies ho sakti hain.

questions.question: Wire ko cut karne ke liye kaun sa tool use hota hai?

options.B: Flat nose pliers

questions.explanation: Wire cutters special tools hote hain jo wires ko clean aur precise tarike se cut karne ke liye design kiye gaye hain.

questions.question: Loops banane ke liye kaun se pliers use kiye jaate hain?

options.B: Round nose pliers

questions.explanation: Round nose pliers ki jaws gol hoti hain, jo wire mein perfect loops aur curves banane ke liye ideal hoti hain.

questions.question: Jump rings ko open aur close karne ke liye kaun se pliers sabse achhe hote hain?

options.B: Round nose pliers
options.C: Two flat nose or chain nose pliers

questions.explanation: Do flat nose ya chain nose pliers ka use karke jump rings ko side-to-side twist karke open aur close karna sabse safe aur effective tareeka hai.

questions.question: Beads ko secure karne ke liye kaun sa finding use hota hai?

options.B: Clasp

questions.explanation: Crimping beads chote metal tubes hote hain jinhe wire par beads ko jagah par secure karne ke liye crimping pliers se press kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Jewellery making mein 'beading wire' kis liye use hota hai?

options.B: For stringing beads to make necklaces and bracelets

questions.explanation: Beading wire ek flexible, multi-strand wire hota hai jise beads ko string karke necklaces, bracelets aur anklets banane ke liye use kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Glass beads kis material se bante hain?

options.B: Clay

questions.explanation: Glass beads molten glass ko shape dekar banaye jaate hain. Yeh alag-alag colours, sizes aur finishes mein available hote hain.

questions.question: Terracotta jewellery banane ke liye kaun sa material use hota hai?

options.B: Polymer clay

questions.explanation: Terracotta jewellery baked clay (pakki hui mitti) se banti hai, jise fir paint aur varnish kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Fabric glue ka kya use hai artificial jewellery mein?

options.A: Metals ko join karne ke liye
options.B: Fabric elements ko dusre materials se chipkane ke liye
options.C: Wires ko secure karne ke liye
options.D: Beads ko polish karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Fabric glue specially designed hota hai fabric materials ko aasani se aur securely chipkane ke liye, jaise fabric beads, patches, ya fabric base par stones.

questions.question: Headpins ka kya purpose hota hai?

options.B: Earrings banane ke liye beads ko hold karna

questions.explanation: Headpins thin wires hote hain jinke ek end par flat head hota hai. Inka use individual beads ko hold karne aur unhe earrings, pendants ya links mein convert karne ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Earring hooks (earwires) kis liye use hote hain?

options.A: Bracelets ko band karne ke liye
options.B: Pendants ko latkane ke liye
options.C: Earrings ko kaan mein pehenne ke liye
options.D: Necklaces ko adjust karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Earring hooks ya earwires woh components hote hain jo earrings ko kaan mein secure karne ke liye use kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Lobster claw clasp ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Necklace ya bracelet ko secure karna

questions.explanation: Lobster claw clasp ek popular closing mechanism hai jo spring-loaded hota hai aur necklaces ya bracelets ko securely band karne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Seed beads kya hote hain?

options.B: Chhote, uniform size ke beads jo intricate designs ke liye use hote hain

questions.explanation: Seed beads bahut chhote, uniform size ke glass beads hote hain jo intricate beading work, weaving aur embroidery ke liye use kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Jewellery making mein 'jump ring' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Components ko aapas mein connect karna

questions.explanation: Jump rings chhote, gol ya oval rings hote hain jo jewellery ke alag-alag components (jaise clasp, pendant, ear hook) ko aapas mein connect karne ke liye use hote hain.

questions.question: Memory wire kis liye use hota hai?

options.B: Apni original shape ko maintain karne ke liye
options.D: Bahut soft jewellery banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Memory wire ek hard-tempered wire hota hai jo apni pre-set coiled shape ko hamesha maintain karta hai. Iska use bracelets aur chokers banane mein hota hai.

questions.question: Silicone moulds kis liye useful hote hain?

options.B: Resin jewellery banane ke liye
options.D: Beads ko polish karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Silicone moulds resin jewellery banane ke liye ideal hote hain, kyunki resin inmein chipakta nahi aur asani se demould ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Which type of glue is best for attaching rhinestones to fabric?

options.B: Fabric glue

questions.explanation: Fabric glue specially formulated hota hai fabric par rhinestones aur anya embellishments ko secure karne ke liye, kyunki yeh flexible hota hai aur dhone ke baad bhi chipka rehta hai.

questions.question: Nylon jaw pliers ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Wire ko bend karna bina scratch kiye

questions.explanation: Nylon jaw pliers mein plastic jaws hoti hain jo wire aur metal sheet ko bend karte samay scratch ya damage hone se bachati hain, especially plated wires.

questions.question: Bead caps kis liye use hote hain?

options.A: Beads ko cover karne ke liye
options.B: Beads ko finish aur decorative look dene ke liye
options.C: Beads ko secure karne ke liye
options.D: Beads ko polish karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Bead caps chhote decorative metal components hote hain jo beads ke upar ya neeche lagaye jaate hain, unhe ek finished aur aesthetically pleasing look dene ke liye.

questions.question: Wire gauge kya represent karta hai?

options.B: Wire ki lambai

questions.explanation: Wire gauge wire ki thickness ko represent karta hai. Lower gauge number ka matlab thicker wire, aur higher gauge number ka matlab thinner wire.

questions.question: Jewellery making mein 'Spacer beads' ka kya function hai?

options.B: Beads ke beech space create karna aur design ko enhance karna

questions.explanation: Spacer beads chhote beads hote hain jo do bade beads ke beech mein lagaye jaate hain, taaki unke beech space bane, design enhance ho aur jewellery flexible rahe.

questions.question: Basic wire loop banane ke liye kaun sa plier use hota hai?

options.B: Round nose pliers

questions.explanation: Round nose pliers ki gol jaws loops banane ke liye perfect hoti hain, jo headpins aur eyepins par loops banane mein madad karti hain.

questions.question: Jump ring ko open karte samay kis direction mein twist karna chahiye?

options.B: Side-to-side

questions.explanation: Jump ring ko side-to-side twist karke open karna chahiye, na ki pull karke. Isse ring ki original shape maintain rehti hai aur woh kamzor nahi hota.

questions.question: Stringing technique mein beads ko kis par dala jaata hai?

options.B: Wire or thread

questions.explanation: Stringing mein beads ko ek wire, thread, ya cord par ek-ek karke dala jaata hai, jisse necklace, bracelet ya anklet banta hai.

questions.question: Crimping beads ko secure karne ke liye kaun se pliers use hote hain?

options.B: Wire cutters

questions.explanation: Crimping pliers specially designed hote hain crimping beads ko press karke secure karne ke liye, taaki beads apni jagah par fix rahen.

questions.question: Wire wrapping mein wire ko kis cheez ke around wrap kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Stones, beads, or other components

questions.explanation: Wire wrapping mein wire ko alag-alag components jaise stones, beads, ya metal frames ke around carefully wrap kiya jaata hai, unhe secure karne aur decorative patterns banane ke liye.

questions.question: Eye pin par 'simple loop' banane ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Components ko connect karne ke liye ek attachment point provide karna

questions.explanation: Simple loop eye pin par ek aasan tareeka hai dusre components (jaise jump rings, chains) ko attach karne ke liye, jisse jewellery ke parts connect ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Dangling earrings banane ke liye kaun si technique commonly use hoti hai?

options.B: Wire wrapping and looping

questions.explanation: Dangling earrings banane ke liye wire wrapping aur looping techniques commonly use hoti hain, jahan beads ya charms ko wire loops ke through earring hooks se joda jaata hai.

questions.question: Bead board ka kya use hai?

options.B: Beads ko clean karna
options.C: Necklace ya bracelet design ko lay out karna aur measure karna

questions.explanation: Bead board ek special tray hoti hai jismein grooves aur measurements hote hain, jo designers ko necklace ya bracelet ke pattern ko stringing se pehle lay out aur visualize karne mein help karte hain.

questions.question: Knots lagana kis type ki jewellery making mein important hai?

options.B: Beaded jewellery with thread/cord

questions.explanation: Jab jewellery thread ya cord se banayi jaati hai (jaise mala, macrame), tab beads ko secure karne aur design elements banane ke liye knots lagana bahut important hota hai.

questions.question: Connectors ka kya role hai jewellery design mein?

options.B: Do ya do se zyada components ko jodne ke liye

questions.explanation: Connectors aise components hote hain jo jewellery ke do ya do se zyada parts ko aapas mein jodte hain, jaise multi-strand necklaces mein.

questions.question: Bead reamer kis liye use hota hai?

options.B: Beads ke holes ko smooth aur enlarge karna

questions.explanation: Bead reamer ek tool hai jiska use beads ke holes ko smooth karne, unke andar ki rough edges ko hatane ya hole ko thoda bada karne ke liye hota hai, taaki wire ya thread asani se guzar sake.

questions.question: Chain nose pliers ka ek mukhya upyog kya hai?

options.B: Wire ko cut karna
options.C: Chhote components ko pakadna aur bend karna

questions.explanation: Chain nose pliers ki pointed jaws hoti hain jo chhote components ko pakadne, wire ko bend karne aur tight jagahon mein kaam karne ke liye bahut useful hoti hain.

questions.question: Measuring tape ka kya importance hai jewellery making mein?

options.B: Necklace ya bracelet ki exact length measure karna

questions.explanation: Measuring tape bahut zaroori hai taaki aap necklace, bracelet ya earring ki exact length measure kar saken aur customer ki requirement ke hisaab se bana saken.

questions.question: Glue drying time ko accelerate karne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Hair dryer ka use karna (carefully)

questions.explanation: Kuchh glues ko hair dryer ki low heat se dry karne se process accelerate ho sakta hai, lekin dhyan rakhen ki material damage na ho.

questions.question: Components ko 'flush cut' karne ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Wire ko lambai mein cut karna
options.B: Wire ko surface ke bilkul barabar cut karna

questions.explanation: Flush cut ka matlab hai wire ko kisi surface ke bilkul barabar cut karna, jisse koi sharp edge na rahe aur ek smooth finish mile. Iske liye flush cutters use hote hain.

questions.question: Design mein 'balance' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sirf ek hi colour use karna
options.B: Components ka weight aur visual impact evenly distribute karna
options.C: Bahut sare bade beads use karna

questions.explanation: Balance ka matlab hai design mein components (jaise beads, pendants) ke weight aur visual impact ko is tarah distribute karna ki jewellery stable aur visually pleasing lage.

questions.question: Symmetry kya hai jewellery design mein?

options.A: Design ka har taraf se alag hona
options.B: Design ka bilkul ek jaisa hona mirror image ki tarah

questions.explanation: Symmetry mein design ke do hisse mirror image ki tarah ek jaise hote hain, jisse ek formal aur balanced look milta hai.

questions.question: Asymmetry ka kya fayda hai design mein?

options.B: It adds visual interest and modernity

questions.explanation: Asymmetry mein components ko unevenly distribute kiya jaata hai, lekin fir bhi visual balance maintain rakha jaata hai. Yeh ek modern, dynamic aur interesting look deta hai.

questions.question: Focal point kya hota hai jewellery design mein?

options.B: Woh area jahan sabse pehle nazar jaati hai

questions.explanation: Focal point design ka woh mukhya hissa hota hai jo sabse zyada attention grab karta hai, jaise ek bada pendant ya ek unique bead.

questions.question: Colour wheel mein 'complementary colours' ek doosre ke kahan hote hain?

options.B: Opposite to each other

questions.explanation: Complementary colours colour wheel par ek doosre ke bilkul opposite hote hain (jaise red aur green, blue aur orange). Yeh colours ek saath use karne par ek vibrant aur high contrast look dete hain.

questions.question: Analogous colours kya hote hain?

options.B: Colours that are next to each other on the colour wheel

questions.explanation: Analogous colours woh hote hain jo colour wheel par ek doosre ke bagal mein hote hain (jaise blue, blue-green, green). Yeh ek harmonious aur calming effect dete hain.

questions.question: Jewellery design mein 'texture' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Jewellery ka colour

questions.explanation: Texture ka matlab hai jewellery ki surface ki feel ya appearance, jaise smooth, rough, matte, shiny. Yeh design mein depth aur interest add karta hai.

questions.question: Warm colours kaun se hote hain?

options.B: Red, Orange, Yellow

questions.explanation: Warm colours (red, orange, yellow) energy aur passion associate karte hain aur design mein warmth aur vibrancy late hain.

questions.question: Cool colours kaun se hote hain?

options.B: Blue, Green, Purple

questions.explanation: Cool colours (blue, green, purple) calmness aur serenity associate karte hain aur design mein ek soothing effect dete hain.

questions.question: Jewellery design mein 'repetition' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Unity aur rhythm create karna

questions.explanation: Repetition (ek hi element ko baar-baar use karna) design mein unity, rhythm aur harmony create karta hai, jisse ek cohesive look milta hai.

questions.question: Mono-chromatic colour scheme kya hoti hai?

options.B: Different shades and tints of a single colour

questions.explanation: Mono-chromatic colour scheme mein ek hi colour ke alag-alag shades, tints aur tones use kiye jaate hain. Yeh ek sophisticated aur cohesive look deti hai.

questions.question: Jewellery design mein 'proportion' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Components ka ek doosre se aur overall design se size relation

questions.explanation: Proportion ka matlab hai design ke alag-alag components ke size ka aapas mein aur poore design ke saath sahi relation, taaki sab kuchh balanced aur aesthetically pleasing lage.

questions.question: Contrast jewellery design mein kya achieve karta hai?

options.B: Visual interest aur elements ko highlight karna

questions.explanation: Contrast (jaise light vs dark, large vs small, smooth vs rough) design mein visual interest add karta hai aur specific elements ko highlight karne mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Negative space ka kya mahatva hai jewellery design mein?

options.B: Yeh design ko cluttered banata hai
options.C: Yeh positive elements ko define karta hai aur unhe 'breathe' karne deta hai

questions.explanation: Negative space woh empty area hota hai jo design elements ke beech ya around hota hai. Yeh positive elements ko define karta hai, unhe prominence deta hai aur design ko 'breathe' karne deta hai, jisse woh cluttered nahi lagta.

questions.question: Aesthetic appeal kya hota hai jewellery design mein?

options.B: Kitni functional hai jewellery
options.C: Jewellery kitni sundar aur visually pleasing hai

questions.explanation: Aesthetic appeal ka matlab hai jewellery kitni sundar, attractive aur visually pleasing lagti hai, jo design principles aur colour theory ke sahi upyog se aati hai.

questions.question: Kundan jewellery mein 'kundan' kya hota hai?

options.B: A method of setting uncut gemstones with gold foil

questions.explanation: Kundan jewellery mein 'kundan' ek traditional technique hai jismein uncut gemstones aur glass stones ko gold foil ka use karke metal base par set kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Meenakari jewellery mein kaun si technique use hoti hai?

options.B: Enamelling (colourful glass work on metal)

questions.explanation: Meenakari ek ancient technique hai jismein metal surface par intricate designs ko colourful glass enamel se fill kiya jaata hai, fir usko heat kiya jaata hai taaki colours set ho jaayen.

questions.question: Terracotta jewellery banane ke liye mitti ko kis process se guzara jaata hai?

options.B: Baking/Firing

questions.explanation: Terracotta jewellery banane ke liye mitti ko shape dene ke baad kiln mein high temperature par bake ya fire kiya jaata hai, jisse woh hard aur durable ho jaati hai.

questions.question: Resin jewellery mein kaun se do components mix kiye jaate hain?

options.B: Resin and hardener

questions.explanation: Resin jewellery banane ke liye liquid resin aur ek hardener ko carefully mix kiya jaata hai, jo dry hone par solid aur transparent ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Fabric jewellery banane ka ek fayda kya hai?

options.B: It is always expensive
options.C: It is lightweight and offers unique textures and colours
options.D: It can only be made from silk

questions.explanation: Fabric jewellery lightweight hoti hai, aur ismein alag-alag fabrics, textures aur colours ka use karke unique designs banaye ja sakte hain.

questions.question: Macrame jewellery mein kaun si technique use hoti hai?

options.B: Knotting (gaanthein lagana)

questions.explanation: Macrame jewellery mein various decorative knots ka use karke patterns aur designs banaye jaate hain, typically cords ya threads se.

questions.question: Bead weaving mein beads ko kaise joda jaata hai?

options.B: By stringing them on a single wire
options.C: By interlacing them with needle and thread in specific patterns

questions.explanation: Bead weaving mein ek needle aur thread ka use karke chhote beads (jaise seed beads) ko intricate patterns mein ek doosre se interlaced kiya jaata hai, jaise peyote stitch ya brick stitch.

questions.question: Multi-strand necklace banane ke liye kya zaroori hai?

options.B: Multiple strands of beads/wire joined at the ends

questions.explanation: Multi-strand necklace mein kai alag-alag strands (wires ya threads par beaded) ko ek saath combine karke ek hi clasp se joda jaata hai, jisse ek rich aur layered look milta hai.

questions.question: Polymer clay jewellery banane ka ek fayda kya hai?

options.B: It is very heavy
options.C: It is versatile, lightweight, and can be baked in a home oven
options.D: It is only available in one colour

questions.explanation: Polymer clay bahut versatile hoti hai, isse alag-alag shapes aur designs banaye ja sakte hain, aur ise ghar ke oven mein bake karke hard kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Jewellery making mein 'micro-macrame' kya hai?

options.B: Fine threads aur chhote beads ka use karke intricate knotting

questions.explanation: Micro-macrame macrame ki ek advanced form hai jismein bahut fine threads aur chhote beads ka use karke intricate aur delicate designs banaye jaate hain.

questions.question: Wire crochet jewellery mein wire ko kaise use kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Crochet hook ka use karke wire ko loop aur stitch karna
options.D: Wire ko seed beads se cover karna

questions.explanation: Wire crochet mein fine gauge wire ko yarn ki tarah use kiya jaata hai aur crochet hook ki madad se loops aur stitches banakar fabrics jaise structure create kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Bezel setting kis liye use hoti hai?

options.B: Cabochon ya flat-backed stones ko secure karna

questions.explanation: Bezel setting ek technique hai jismein ek metal strip ko stone ke around wrap karke usse secure kiya jaata hai, especially cabochons (flat-backed stones) ke liye.

questions.question: Jewellery mein 'enamel' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: A glassy substance fused to metal for decoration

questions.explanation: Enamel ek glassy substance hota hai jise metal surface par apply karke heat kiya jaata hai, jisse yeh fuse ho kar ek colourful aur durable decorative coating banata hai.

questions.question: Zardozi work jewellery mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: Intricate embroidery with metal threads and embellishments

questions.explanation: Zardozi work ek traditional Indian embroidery technique hai jismein gold aur silver threads, sequins, beads aur precious stones ka use karke intricate patterns banaye jaate hain, jise jewellery mein bhi incorporate kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Paper quilling jewellery mein paper ko kaise use kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Paper strips ko roll, shape aur glue karke designs banana

questions.explanation: Paper quilling jewellery mein paper ki patli strips ko roll, curl aur shape dekar intricate aur lightweight designs banaye jaate hain, jinko fir varnish se seal kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Jewellery making mein 'filigree' kya hai?

options.B: Delicate metalwork using fine wires to create intricate patterns

questions.explanation: Filigree ek delicate metalwork technique hai jismein fine metal wires ko twist aur curl karke intricate, lace-like patterns banaye jaate hain, jinhe fir solder kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Cabochon kya hota hai?

options.B: A flat-backed stone with a smooth, domed top

questions.explanation: Cabochon ek type ka stone cut hai jismein stone ka base flat hota hai aur top smooth, gol ya domed hota hai, bina facets ke.

questions.question: Kumihimo braid ka kya use hai jewellery mein?

options.B: Intricate cord braids banane ke liye
options.D: Resin ko mix karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Kumihimo ek Japanese braiding technique hai jismein threads ya cords ko disc ya marudai ka use karke intricate, round ya flat braids banaye jaate hain, jo necklaces aur bracelets mein use hote hain.

questions.question: Shamballa bracelets kis technique se bante hain?

options.B: Macrame knotting

questions.explanation: Shamballa bracelets macrame knotting technique ka use karke banaye jaate hain, jismein beads ko knots ke beech mein secure kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Jewellery mein 'embroidery' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Needle aur thread se fabric ya base par decorative patterns banana

questions.explanation: Embroidery jewellery mein needle aur thread ka use karke fabric ya leather base par decorative patterns banaye jaate hain, jismein beads, sequins aur threads ka use hota hai.

questions.question: Artificial jewellery ko tarnish hone se bachane ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Store in open air
options.C: Store in an airtight bag or box
options.D: Wash with soap and water daily

questions.explanation: Artificial jewellery ko airtight bag ya box mein store karne se air aur moisture ke contact se bacha ja sakta hai, jisse tarnish hone ka process slow ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Jewellery ko clean karne ke liye kaun sa material use karna chahiye?

options.B: Harsh chemicals

questions.explanation: Jewellery ko soft, lint-free cloth se gently wipe karna chahiye taaki uski shine bani rahe aur woh scratch na ho.

questions.question: Jewellery ki 'quality check' mein kya dekha jaata hai?

options.B: Components ka secure hona, finish, aur durability

questions.explanation: Quality check mein dekha jaata hai ki sabhi components securely attached hain, finish smooth hai, koi sharp edges nahi hain aur jewellery durable hai.

questions.question: Jewellery ko sell karte samay 'product description' mein kya shamil hona chahiye?

options.B: Material, size, unique features, aur care instructions

questions.explanation: Ek achhi product description mein material, size, unique features, aur care instructions shamil hone chahiye, taaki customer ko poori jaankari mile.

questions.question: Jewellery ko gift wrap karne ka ek fayda kya hai?

options.A: It makes the product look cheap
options.B: It enhances the perceived value and customer experience
options.C: It is a waste of time
options.D: It only adds to the cost

questions.explanation: Attractive gift wrapping product ki perceived value badhati hai aur customer ko ek special experience deti hai, jisse brand loyalty badhti hai.

questions.question: Artificial jewellery ki costing karte samay kya factors consider karne chahiye?

options.B: Material cost, labour cost, overheads, aur desired profit margin

questions.explanation: Costing mein material cost, aapki mehnat (labour), shop rent ya electricity jaise overheads, aur aapka profit margin sab shamil hona chahiye.

questions.question: Social media marketing ka kya fayda hai artificial jewellery business ke liye?

options.B: Only for big brands
options.C: Wide reach to potential customers and showcasing designs

questions.explanation: Social media platforms par aap apne designs ko wide audience tak pahuncha sakte hain, naye customers ko attract kar sakte hain aur apni brand visibility badha sakte hain.

questions.question: Customer feedback kyon important hai?

options.B: To ignore complaints

questions.explanation: Customer feedback sunna bahut zaroori hai, kyunki isse aapko apne products aur services mein sudhar karne aur customer satisfaction badhane mein madad milti hai.

questions.question: Jewellery ki packaging mein 'branding' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Apne brand ka logo, naam aur unique identity ko packaging par incorporate karna

questions.explanation: Branding ka matlab hai apni unique identity (logo, naam, colour scheme) ko packaging par show karna, jisse customer aapke product ko recognize kar sake.

questions.question: Online platform par jewellery sell karte samay kya zaroori hai?

options.B: High-quality product photos and clear descriptions

questions.explanation: Online selling mein customer product ko physically nahi dekh sakta, isliye high-quality photos aur detailed descriptions bahut zaroori hain taaki unhe product ki sahi jaankari mile.

questions.question: Jewellery ko store karte samay 'tangle' hone se bachane ke liye kya karein?

options.A: Sab jewellery ko ek saath dal dein
options.B: Har piece ko alag-alag pouch ya compartment mein store karein

questions.explanation: Har jewellery piece ko alag-alag pouch ya compartment mein rakhne se woh tangle hone se bachegi aur damage nahi hogi.

questions.question: Wholesale selling mein pricing strategy kaisi honi chahiye?

options.B: Retail price se kam, taaki retailer apna profit margin add kar sake

questions.explanation: Wholesale pricing retail price se kam honi chahiye, taaki retailer ko bhi apna profit margin mil sake aur woh aapke products ko aage sell kar sake.

questions.question: Event ya exhibition mein jewellery sell karte samay kya important hai?

options.B: Attractive display, good lighting, aur engaging with customers

questions.explanation: Events aur exhibitions mein ek attractive display, achhi lighting aur customers ke saath engaging conversation bahut zaroori hai taaki aapki jewellery bik sake.

questions.question: Jewellery business mein 'inventory management' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Raw materials aur finished products ka stock track karna

questions.explanation: Inventory management ka matlab hai apne raw materials (beads, wires) aur finished products ka stock accurately track karna, taaki aapko pata rahe ki kya available hai aur kya order karna hai.

questions.question: Long-term success ke liye artificial jewellery business mein kya maintain karna zaroori hai?

options.B: Consistency in quality and continuous innovation

questions.explanation: Long-term success ke liye, apne products ki quality mein consistency maintain karna aur naye trends aur designs ke saath innovate karte rehna bahut zaroori hai.
